title.name: Commerce and Economic and Community Development

sections.heading: Secs. 32-245 and 32-246. Commission on Connecticut's Future; Report on economic renewal of Connecticut. Department of Economic and Community Development to provide personnel and resources.

body: Sections 32-245 and 32-246 are repealed, effective July 13, 2021.
content.plainText: Sections 32-245 and 32-246 are repealed, effective July 13, 2021.
